name: Axclusive
notes:
Axclusive (AS132337) is a Singapore-based network operator providing high-performance connectivity and digital infrastructure services across the region. Our core offerings include IP transit, colocation, Multi-CDN & Smart DNS solutions, with a primary focus on enterprise and wholesale customers.

We operate in key Singapore data centers and Internet Exchanges, enabling direct peering and optimized routing for low-latency and high-reliability traffic delivery. Our network is designed to support scalable and deterministic performance for content providers, cloud platforms, and regional carriers.

Axclusive maintains an open peering policy and welcomes collaboration with networks seeking efficient interconnection in Singapore and beyond.
